CAREERS

 

 

Brewery Retail Shop, Tap Room and Farmers Market Associate - Part time

Bicycle Craft Brewery is seeking a Part Time Retail and Tap Room Associate mostly for weekend shifts on Saturdays and Sundays.

As the Retail and Tap Room associate, your primary responsibility is to represent Bicycle Craft Brewery with great customer service skills.

Responsibilities

- sample, serve and sell Bicycle products to customers
- perform opening and closing duties for the Retail Shop and Tap Room for weekends and/or closing in the evenings during the week.
- host private events by providing excellent customer service
- package online orders for in-store pickup and home delivery
- maintain cleanliness of Tap Room and Retail Shop
- represent Bicycle at select farmer's markets, off-site events and festivals when needed

Requirements

- Excellent customer service skills
- Ability to discuss beer with customers
- Proactive, self-reliant, motivated, professional and responsible
- Available to work weekends, evenings and flexible hours
- G driver's licence
- Service experience considered an asset
- Smart Serve Certified

Bicycle Craft Brewery welcomes and encourages applications from all qualified candidates regardless of race, sex, religion, age and ability.

Accommodations are available upon request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection
